subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who, upon His ascendancy to the Throne of Revelation, proclaimed: "Verily, there is no God but Me, the All-Protecting." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق حین استوائه علی عرش الظهور انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
